hub.description: Central coordination node for the DJ-Goana-Coding Hub-and-Spoke network.

spokes.description: S10 Termux node running quantitative trading and market-analysis pipelines.
Distributed swarm intelligence node providing momentum and market-sentiment data.

core_engine.description: Primary intelligence driving the A.I.O.N. Network and the Citadel architecture. Operates across the 144-Grid with extended context and multi-district logic.

visual.description: Visual Manifestation Engine — text-to-image, image composition, style transfer.

harmonic.description: Harmonic Generation Engine — 30-second music tracks, 888Hz sovereign frequency.
